changes.source: Official Porsche AG press release: 'Only 987 cars: Boxster S Black Edition' — confirmed by Porsche Newsroom, corroborated by stuttcars.com and autoevolution.com. The 987-unit cap was a deliberate reference to the 987 chassis designation.
changes.notes: Also fixed in notes prose at same line block — 'exactly 987 units worldwide' replaces '~990 units'.

changes.old_value: The Black Edition (MY2011, ~990 units, +10 hp ECU remap, all-black trim)
changes.new_value: The Black Edition (MY2011, exactly 987 units worldwide, +10 hp ECU remap, all-black trim)
changes.source: Same official Porsche AG press release as s07-auto-001.
changes.notes: Minor prose fix bundled with numeric correction.

changes.source: Prior audit session established 2,486 as HIGH confidence (Wikipedia, stuttcars, multiple Rennlist/Planet-9 sources). The production field at line 3348 was already updated to 2,486 in that prior session; this fix brings the value_drivers description into consistency.
changes.notes: Prior audit updated variants[].production but missed the parallel value_drivers description — consistency fix, not a new research finding.

986_boxster_s_50896.value: 50,896 worldwide (all 986 Boxster S incl. 1,953 50th Anniversary units)
